$comment: Chatframe branding + theme config. Edit this file in-place on a running instance — the next page load picks up the changes (no rebuild, no restart). For PWA shortcuts already installed on a device, the OS-cached launcher icon won't update until you reinstall the PWA.
name: Chatframe
defaultSystemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant.
$welcomeMessageNote: Rendered as the first assistant bubble whenever the chat is empty. Plain string OR per-locale object: { en: '...', es: '...', de: '...' }. Markdown supported. Leave empty to show the default 'Start a conversation.' placeholder.

welcomeMessage.en: Hi — I'm a Cordfuse demo of Chatframe. I can pull live Microsoft docs via MCP, search the web, and help with anything else you'd ask a smart assistant. Try one of the prompts below, or ask me anything.
welcomeMessage.es: Hola — soy una demo de Cordfuse de Chatframe. Puedo consultar documentación de Microsoft en vivo vía MCP, buscar en la web y ayudarte con cualquier cosa que le preguntarías a un asistente inteligente. Prueba uno de los prompts de abajo o pregúntame lo que quieras.
welcomeMessage.fr: Bonjour — je suis une démo Cordfuse de Chatframe. Je peux récupérer la documentation Microsoft en direct via MCP, faire des recherches web et vous aider sur tout ce que vous demanderiez à un assistant intelligent. Essayez l'une des invites ci-dessous ou posez-moi votre question.
welcomeMessage.de: Hallo — ich bin eine Cordfuse-Demo von Chatframe. Ich kann Microsoft-Dokumentation live über MCP abrufen, das Web durchsuchen und bei allem helfen, was du einen smarten Assistenten fragen würdest. Probiere einen der Prompts unten oder frag mich einfach.

$starterPromptsNote: Clickable pill chips below the welcome bubble. Each prompt is sent verbatim as the user's first message on click. Empty array hides the chip row. Plain array OR per-locale object: { en: [...], es: [...] }.

en: Help me draft a friendly OOO email
es: Últimas noticias sobre agentes de IA
Explica los pods de Kubernetes en 3 frases
Ayúdame a redactar un email amable de fuera de oficina
fr: Dernières actualités sur les agents IA
Explique les pods Kubernetes en 3 phrases
Aide-moi à rédiger un email d'absence du bureau sympathique
de: Hilf mir, eine freundliche Abwesenheitsmail zu schreiben

$iconNote: Paths served by the /branding/* route, which streams files from config/icons/. Drop your PNGs into config/icons/ and reference them here as /branding/<filename>. icon192 drives the browser favicon AND the PWA 192 icon; icon512 is PWA only. PWA installs already on a device may keep the OS-cached launcher icon until reinstalled.
$themesExample: Add as many entries as you want. Each theme overrides every CSS custom property the app uses. category is 'dark' or 'light'. swatches is a 3-color preview shown in the Settings picker. The 'cordfuse' entry below is a working example — delete it or replace it with your brand.
